query:
INSERT INTO printers (establishmentId, name, ipAddress, port, printerType, isActive, isDefault, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
(1, 'Impressora 1 - Principal', '192.168.123.100', 9100, 'all', true, true, NOW(), NOW()),
(1, 'Impressora 2 - Secundária', '192.168.68.101', 9100, 'all', true, false, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updatedAt = NOW();
